title: 阪神大賞典の後に・長

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite winning the Hanshin Daishoten, Narita
Brian's hunger is far from sated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, news drops that Mejiro McQueen
and Mihono Bourbon are entering the spring
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eager to race them, we decide to enter as well!
